description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular body with a reinforced exoskeleton frame and a protective roll cage, designed for high durability in rugged environments. The exterior is primarily a matte light gray with black accents, including the wheel arches, bumpers, and side rails. Large, knobby tires with deep treads are mounted on sturdy black rims, optimized for traction on uneven surfaces. The vehicle has a compact, enclosed cabin with visible side windows and a roof hatch, as well as a rear cargo rack for additional storage. Antennas and external fixtures suggest off-road communication and navigation capabilities. The overall design emphasizes both safety and performance, making it suitable for urban exploration and off-road adventures.
description: A rugged, light gray all-terrain vehicle with a reinforced roll cage, large knobby tires, and black protective accents, built for durability and off-road performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular hood, protective front bumper, and the reinforced roll cage structure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large tires, side rails, and the compact cabin with a visible antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the cargo rack, rear bumper, and the back of the roll cage.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tires, side rails, and rear cargo area.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose and uneven terrain, making them suitable for all-terrain use.
